required_skills: Career coaching certifications from an ICF or CCE accredited organization
A passion for coaching entry to midlevel professionals
Career coaching skills including career transition
education_requirements: College degree in psychology, counseling, or related field
compensation_benefits: Set your own hours anywhere from 10 to 30 hours per week
Create a profile to match with clients needing your coaching expertise
No hardcore sales or marketing to grow your roster of clients
